restaurants.name: Moz Café
restaurants.hours: 08:00 am – 08:30 pm; open only till 2pm on Monday; closed on Sunday
restaurants.ambience: Small restaurant with local vibe and great ocean views
highlights: Serves coffee, beer, wine, and dessert
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

restaurants.name: Snack Mahana
restaurants.hours: 11:00 am – 2:00 pm; closed on Sunday and Monday
highlights: Always packed with locals and tourists
Fresh fish served in a variety of styles
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

restaurants.name: Roulette le spot 64 Moorea
highlights: Known for burritos and poke bowls, sandwiches
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

restaurants.name: Carameline
highlights: Traditional viennoiseries to unique tropical flavors
Savory options including burgers, salads, and local dishes
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

restaurants.name: Rudy's
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

restaurants.name: Moorea Beach Café
restaurants.ambience: Stunning lagoon views, especially at sunset, lively bar with live music
highlights: Diverse menu with international and local cuisine
Fresh seafood, sushi, and wood-fired pizzas
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

restaurants.name: Te Honu Iti
restaurants.ambience: Lagoon-side location that attracts local marine life with sting rays
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

attractions.name: Toatea Lookout
attractions.description: Beautiful spot where you can admire the Sofitel Hotel with its overwater bungalows, the turquoise lagoon, the reef protecting the island, and Tahiti in the distance
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

attractions.name: Cook's Bay
attractions.description: Discover lush vegetation and a pineapple plantation on the mountainside
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

attractions.name: Tahiamanu Public Beach
attractions.description: Perfect for taking photos, located between the two bays
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

attractions.name: Tropical Garden Viewpoint
attractions.description: Offers a stunning view of the second bay, called Opunohu, which is more wild and untouched. You can also have fresh juices here
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf

attractions.name: Belvedere Lookout
attractions.description: Located in the heart of the valley at 400 meters altitude, this viewpoint offers an incredible view of both bays and Mount Rotui. A must-see
source_files: French Polynesia/French Polynesia All Inclusive Guide - Apeksha and Nitin.pdf
